item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stays direct and structures the three-way tradeoff around cost, speed, and experience. It lists direct and hidden costs, budget and reputation impacts, and explicitly frames the choice as user-owned rather than forcing a brake verdict or triage process. The final conditional guidance does not over-decide; it maps tolerable losses to likely directions."}
